# Product - UoM Measure Type

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:957829152888bc8457ded53014c6d576044c2fa8a669e511525d0ab11ba9fbaf
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module extend the product module.

- It adds a new selection field `measure_type`
  on `uom.category` and `uom.uom` models.
  This fields was present until the V13 in odoo `uom` module.
- It adds a related field `uom_measure_type` on the `product.template` model.

It is a technical module that doesn't add any feature by itself.

```{contents}
:local: true
```

functions.name: odoo.addons.product_uom_measure_type.hooks.pre_init_hook
documentation:
Quick populate new product.template field 'uom_measure_type'
to avoid slowness if this is done by the ORM, in the case of
installation of this module on a large database.
